translation_findings.note: translated/page_389.json question[1] still has 'ウ./エ.' prefix in zh+en, but output/page_389.md zh+en render clean A/B/C/D for all choices and answer-lines. Release artifact is clean. Same stale-stage observation as p342.

EN stem says 'Availability is rounded to two decimal places (third decimal place rounded)' which is internally redundant; JP '小数第3位を四捨五入' = 'round at the 3rd decimal' (i.e. keep 2 decimals). Output renders same text; meaning is preserved but phrasing is awkward. Cosmetic.
